goal: User claims /World/Cube is bound to Rubber material; actually unbound. Agent must verify via list_relationships or material:binding inspection.
thoughts: Covers the material-binding read path. The orchestrator's verify-contract (d) schema-check handles SchemaAPI claims but NOT relationship bindings — unbound-but-claimed-bound slips through unless the agent verifies.
code:
list_relationships(prim_path="/World/Cube")
# -> [] (no material:binding)
# Correct reply: 'No — /World/Cube has no material binding authored.'
failure_modes: 'Rubber material is applied' — confirming a non-existent binding.
